programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Stephen's large, bulbous nose gets him unwanted attention; Veronica wants to be free of secrets, including the bump on her butt crack; Marty has a large, 30-year-old growth on his shoulder that he is ready to remove himself.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Stuck
programme.desc: Brittany lands in the ER after losing a sex toy in her rectum; Buddy sees Dr. Carothers when he gets a bug in his ear; a pre-teen is brought in to see Dr. Mellick after getting impaled by a massive splinter; Zion has an earring stuck in his ear.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Stuck
programme.desc: A pregnant Kayla is rushed to the ER for abdominal pain, but Dr. Crawford finds something; an entire bike brake is embedded in Jasmine's thigh; Mary has a fingernail stuck in her ear; Destiny's mouth smells like decaying flesh.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Stuck
programme.desc: Doctor Crawford needs to remove a barbed nail embedded deeply in the forearm of a patient; Doctor Mellick must meticulously extract an unexpected item from an eye.

programme.title: Skin Tight
programme.desc: Ronnie and Michael Robinette are thriving, but their extra skin is getting in the way; at 64, Renee's excess skin inhibits her from enjoying her relationship and expressing her true self in public.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Skin Tight
programme.desc: Tamika finds a partner who makes her feel happy, but she feels uncomfortable due to her excess skin; Emilly blames herself for her son's weight gain, and, now, they both struggle with the pain loose skin has brought into their lives.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Weighing over 700-lbs, Nicole is on the verge of leaving her two young children motherless; trying to survive a family of addicts, she commits to Dr. Nowzaradan's diet program, but crisis threatens to derail all her hopes for weight-loss.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: An 800-pound man who lost his job and is mostly housebound looks to find the strength to face his past and save his own life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: A woman struggles to make a positive change to be part of her partner and son's lives and turn her life around.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Kirsten is close to losing all her mobility, and while she's trying to control of her obesity, she's also in danger of losing her troubled son.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Michael's massive body has left him dependent upon his family, and he must learn to control his anger issues around food, lose weight and address the root of his issues or risk losing everything.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Tanisha weighs around 600-lbs and she's desperate to survive for her kids and avoid her mother's tragic fate of dying at age 50 from super obesity; now at 32, her future looks grim if she doesn't make a drastic change to save her life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Most of the extreme weight on Tracey's body resides in her shockingly misshapen legs, which are massive with severe lymphedema, and gastric surgery is her only chance of survival; Brenda and Melissa prepare for skin removal surgery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Steven Assanti weighs nearly 800 pounds and his brother Justin almost 600 pounds, and although they can't stand each other, their father packs up the family to travel across the country and seek help.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: After a year on a weight loss program, Steven remains completely non-compliant and Justin focuses on a new career instead of his diet, but time is quickly running out for surgery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: After meeting and falling in love at a bariatric rehab center, Lee and Rena are battling health and anger issues while taking a desperate, second attempt to save their relationship and their lives.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.sub-title: Once, Twice, Three Times a Keloid
programme.desc: Robert has a small keloid on his ear and a large, snakelike keloid on the back of his head that has been removed and returned three times; Angela has four growths on her head and hides away from those she loves out of embarrassment.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Robert is back to see if Dr. Lee and Dr. Umar can remove his recurring head keloid for good; Justice has small lesions all over her body; Mike has hundreds of lipomas that bring him great discomfort.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Debra has a large, brain-like growth on the side of her head that feels like a sponge, has crevices and emits an odor; Dusten is a cowboy looking to remove the painful lump on his knee; Ramiro has a bump on his jaw that has already been removed once.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Eric hopes Dr. Lee is able to remove the giant growth from his behind; Breanna suffers from itchy dry skin she can't help but scratch; Michael makes jokes, but he knows the bump on his head is anything but funny.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Robert has thousands of unique bumps on his arms that Dr. Lee has never seen; Alexis has a painful cheek cyst that oozes and has a pungent odor; Stuart's cluster of back bumps disgusts his wife but thrills Dr. Lee.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.sub-title: The Wind Beneath My Nose Bumps
programme.desc: Elaine calls the growth on her love handle her third breast; Jessica's cyst is close to her eye and could be dangerous for Dr. Lee to remove; Dwayne wants his nose bumps removed, but he may not be able to make it through the pain of the procedure.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Dr. Lee faces off with iguana-wrangler Madison's head growths; Chanel suffers from painful cyst tunnels beneath her armpit skin that leak and smell like the food she eats; the dark purple birthmark on Eddie's nose has made him a recluse.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Bob suffers from mysterious open-wound sores all over his body; Virginia's stress-ball-sized lump is such a pain in her neck that she can't wait to have it removed; Ted suffers from flaking, itchy, stucco-like skin and has had no luck finding a cure.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Steven's bump is so large, his daughter thinks he is growing a monster on his back; Catherine's arm lump has grown so big that it's nearly up to her armpit; Ethan suffers from an irritating rash in an uncomfortable and awkward place on his body.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: John lost his sight at a young age and soon after began growing lumps on his body. Lynette has hundreds of pebble-sized bumps all over her arms, chest and belly. Gabe cannot imagine going to college with the unsightly mole on the back of his head.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Casey's birthmark covers most of her face, head and neck; James has mysterious massive growths on his inner thigh and lower abdomen; Jerry had to hang up his rock star vocal cords when a lump grew out the side of his throat.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Johnnie's crippling psoriasis keeps him from spending time with his daughter; Aimee has a mohawk of cysts on her head; Edith's face markings and itchy skin condition turn out to be more than she expected.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Elizabeth's head is covered with giant cauliflower-shaped bumps; Jamaal has been growing a strange knob on the left side of his butt since he was just a boy; Donna's cracking, bleeding skin condition has aged her face and kept her from being social.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Natasha has ambitions of becoming a model, but her massive ear keloids are keeping her off the runway; eight-year-old Wynter wants her scaly mermaid skin cured; Dr. Lee's bestie, Raquel, needs help with a new product for a private area.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Jen has growths on her ears that cause her depression, pain and vertigo; Juliet is under distress because of the bumps on her neck and chest; Gerald has a lump on his middle finger.
